comment: Exact lexical match; both are Document subclasses describing reviews.
Conference (one edition) concept aligns across ontologies.
Accepted paper concepts align; minor lexical differences (underscore).
EDAS Author (defined via relation to Paper) corresponds closely to EKAW Paper_Author; not identical modeling.
Presenter maps directly (both are roles of conference participants).
Programme in EDAS corresponds to EKAW Programme_Brochure (document listing events); similar semantics.
Both properties link Papers/Events to topics/research topics; equivalent usage.
Inverse/property naming differs but role is equivalent: papers have reviewers.
Both denote authoring relation between Document/Paper and Person.
SocialEvent aligns in both ontologies (both are Event subclasses).
